Name: Town Square
Description: The center of a small town. There are merchant booths lined up around
what seems to be a fountain. The locals don't seem to happy about it...

Name: Town Hall
Description: You enter the town hall. As you enter you immediately understand where
much of the towns funds go...

Name: Loud Crowd
Description:
As you try to look around the plaza your attention is caught by the loud
crowd shouting down a street. At what you don't know as your view is
blocked by the masses. But it's clear they're not shouting out of joy...

Name: Market
Description:
The market. A circle of vendors selling their wares. The vendors are a mix
of locals and travelers, all trying to make a living in this harsh world.
The goods they sell are a mix of useful and useless items, but you might
find some interesting things here if you look hard enough.

Name: Vendor 1
Description: You approach the first vendor. The vendor is a middle aged man.
He seems to be selling some form of bone ornaments and accessories.

Name: Vendor 2
Description: You approach the second vendor. The vendor is a older man.
He seems to be selling some form of potions and elixirs.

Name: Vendor 3
Description: You approach the third vendor. The vendor is a young lady.
She seems to be selling some form of trinkets and baubles.

Name: Vendor 4
Description: You approach the fourth vendor. The vendor is a very old woman.
She seems to be selling some form of herbs and spices.

Name: Tavern
Description:
The local tavern. The smell of ale and sweat fills the air.
The patrons are a mix of locals and travelers, all seeking refuge
from the harsh world outside. Opposite of the entrance there is a bar.
A large and gruff looking bartender stands there cleaning a glass.
On the wall behind him a large and intricately designed sword lays
on two supporting brackets. The fine craftsmanship along the clear signs
of wear tell the tale of thousands of battles once fought.
To your left is a stairway leading up to the second floor.

Name: Bartender
Description:
You approach the bartender. The bartender is a large and gruff man.
He seems entranced by the simple act of cleaning a glass,
yet it's clear his mind is elsewhere.

Name: Drunk Patron
Description:
You approach a drunk patron sitting at the bar. He looks up at you
with bleary eyes and slurred speech. He seems to be in a bad mood,
yet he's very talkative ranting to a small group of patrons.

Name: Tavern Second Floor
Description:
The second floor of the tavern. The hallway is dimly lit and the air
is thick with the smell of smoke and alcohol. The doors along
the walls are closed, but you can hear muffled sounds coming from behind some
of them. At the end of the hallway a staircase leads up to the third floor.

Name: Door 1
Description: You open the first door on your left. Inside you see a group
of rowdy patrons playing cards. They look up at you with suspicion and hostility.

Name: Door 2
Description: You open the second door on your left. Inside you see a small group
of patrons huddled around a table. They look up at you with fear and desperation.

Name: Door 3
Description: You open the first door on your right. Inside you see a lone patron
sitting at a table. He looks up at you with sadness and regret.

Name: Tavern Third Floor
Description:
The third floor of the tavern. The hallway is even dimmer than
the second floor and the air is thick with the smell of smoke and alcohol.
The right side of the hallway has windows letting light shine in...
Yet you don't remember the sun shining so darkly.
At the end of the hallway a large blackwood door stands.
You don't feel safe here...

Name: Windows
Description:
You look out the windows. The view is bleak and desolate.
The town is surrounded by a barren wasteland.
The sky is dark and cloudy, with no sign of the sun.
The only thing you can see in the distance is a large
swirling storm as black as charcoal...
And it's getting closer, very slowly...

Name: Blackwood Door
Description:
The large blackwood door. The wood is old and weathered,
yet it still looks sturdy. The iron handle is cold to the touch.
You don't want to open it, but you can't help but feel drawn to it.

Name: Dark Room
Description:
You open the door... Inside you see a small room with
a single chair in the center. The walls are covered
in strange symbols and the air is thick with the smell of incense.
You suddenly notice the figure sitting in the chair at the center of the room.
The figure is shrouded in darkness and even as they seem to be
watching the slowly approaching storm you can feel their piercing gaze on you..

Name: Town Hall
Description:
The town hall. The building is large and imposing, with a grand entrance and a clock tower.
The interior is just as grand, with marble floors and ornate decorations.
Though as large as the building seems to be the reception is suprisingly
empty besides the two receptionists.

Name: Receptionist 1
Description:
You approach the first receptionist. The receptionist is a middle aged woman
with a stern expression. She seems to be busy with paperwork,
but she looks up at you as you approach.

Name: Receptionist 2
Description:
You approach the second receptionist. The receptionist is a young man
with a friendly expression. He seems to be busy with paperwork,
but he looks up at you as you approach.
